narrative:
Glenwillow-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 244 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 33.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 27.5 percentage points.
